description:
Momose has always longed for a peaceful high school life. She wants nothing to do with hoodlums, delinquents, or troublemakers. When she meets Ichikura, an inconspicuous black-haired boy with glasses, he looks like a normal, nice guy. But it turns out that back in junior high he was a nefarious delinquent!
He keeps assuring her that he`s changed his ways, but he`s still pretty quick to pick fights! Has Ichikura really turned over a new leaf? And will Momose keep quiet about his rowdy past?
Source: Seven Seas Entertainment

WIKIPEDIA_JP: メガネ、時々、ヤンキーくん

titles.title: メガネ, 時々, ヤンキーくん
Glasses with a Chance of Delinquent
